default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Sunbit and GrowthX to discuss SEO progress, content strategy, and analytics insights.](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Organic traffic is improving, with sessions and active users up across metrics](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Shop directory loans have significantly increased (60k+ YTD vs 10k last year)](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [New case study framework established for dental and auto industries](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Potential GA4 tracking anomalies identified, requiring further investigation](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)

## Topics

### SEO and Content Progress

  - [B2B articles focused on dentists and auto repair shops are in EOS](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Publishing automation prioritized to high, expected completion before Oct 20](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [Organic traffic showing positive trends:](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [Sessions and active users increasing](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [Top traffic-driving pages back to top positions after applying redirects](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)

### Analytics Concerns

  - [Shop directory view event missing from GA4 key events](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [Discrepancy noted between GSC and GA4 traffic trends](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Kyle suggested investigating potential session anomalies in GA4](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)

### Shop Directory Performance

  - [Over 60,000 loans through shop directory YTD (vs 10,000 last year)](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [3x increase from entire previous year (20,000), with 3 months still remaining](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Direct correlation established between site traffic increase and shop directory views/purchases](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)

### Case Study Strategy

  - [New framework for generalized case studies presented](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Plan to use real numbers and merchant details from Sunbit's weekly wins](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [Opportunity to scale case study production using existing data and images](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)

### Miscellaneous Updates

  - [Marcel (likely from GrowthX) attempted to schedule a meeting in Seattle](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [Brief discussion on AI tools for image generation and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Angel to compile spreadsheet of weekly wins data for case studies, including images](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [Ehtisham to use provided data to produce more detailed case studies](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [GrowthX team to investigate GA4 anomalies, particularly around event tracking and session data](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Jason to look into the removal of shop directory view event in GA4](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Team to consider classifying shared image files as "external" for security purposes](https://fathom.video/share/qcqgrgHb26qoZn7HTxTdurAzX-LCm8Qu?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)

action_items.description: Investigate discrepancies between GSC and GA4 session data trends
Investigate removal of shop directory view event from Google Analytics
Create spreadsheet w/ weekly wins data (real numbers, names, images) for dental & auto case studies
